chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-732 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on MA-1437 of 2022 For orders on MA-1438 of 2022 01.12.2025. Mr. Saad Salman Ghani, Advocate. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant Advocate General, Sindh = Through the captioned petition, the petitioner has prayed for up- gradation from BPS-6 to BPS- 16. The petition came up for hearing and was finally disposed of vide order dated 13.03.22018, concluding paragraph of the order dated 13.03.22018 is reproduced as under:- “5. Having heard the learned counsels and gone through the record. In our humble understanding the benefit as is available to the petitioners cannot be restrained without any actual restrict. Nothing has been shown to us to restrict that benefit rather documents have been brought before us, which, shows an element on discrimination. In the circumstances, this petition is allowed. The respondents are directed to upgrade and re-designate the petitioner within a period of 45 days under intimation to the Additional Registrar of this Court without fail. Non-compliance on part of the concern respondents is to be treated as insubordination to the orders of this Court. Matter stands disposed of to the above terms.” Thereafter, the petitioner moved the listed application alleging failure of respondents/alleged contemnors to comply with the aforesaid order. Today, the applicant and his counsel are called absent therefore, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss the CMA No.1438 of 2022 in default. It is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE
